auth.label: API Token
auth.description: AppVeyor API token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Find or create it on the AppVeyor API token page: https://ci.appveyor.com/api-keys.

extraFields.label: Account Name
extraFields.description: Optional AppVeyor account name used to scope user-level API keys through /api/account/{accountName}. AppVeyor documents this requirement in the REST API authentication guide: https://www.appveyor.com/docs/api/.

actions.name: get_build_artifacts
actions.description: List artifacts produced by one AppVeyor build job.

accountName.description: The AppVeyor account name used to scope requests for user-level API keys.

jobId.description: The AppVeyor build job ID whose artifacts should be listed.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing artifacts produced by one AppVeyor build job.

name.description: The artifact display name when AppVeyor returns one.

size.description: The artifact size in bytes when AppVeyor returns it.

created.description: The timestamp when the artifact was created.

items.description: An AppVeyor build artifact returned by the build job artifacts API.

artifacts.description: The AppVeyor build artifacts returned by the request.

count.description: The number of AppVeyor artifacts returned by the request.

outputSchema.description: The normalized AppVeyor build artifacts list.

actions.name: get_environments
actions.description: List AppVeyor deployment environments accessible to the connected API token.

accountName.description: The AppVeyor account name used to scope requests for user-level API keys.

inputSchema.description: Optional AppVeyor account scoping parameters for this request.

deploymentEnvironmentId.description: The numeric AppVeyor deployment environment ID.

created.description: The timestamp when the environment was created.

updated.description: The timestamp when the environment was last updated.

items.description: An AppVeyor deployment environment returned by the environments API.

environments.description: The AppVeyor deployment environments returned by the request.

count.description: The number of AppVeyor environments returned by the request.

actions.name: get_projects
actions.description: List AppVeyor projects accessible to the connected API token.

accountName.description: The AppVeyor account name used to scope requests for user-level API keys.

inputSchema.description: Optional AppVeyor account scoping parameters for this request.

accountId.description: The numeric AppVeyor account ID that owns the project.

accountName.description: The AppVeyor account name that owns the project.

repositoryType.description: The source repository provider type configured for the project.

repositoryScm.description: The source control management type configured for the project.

repositoryName.description: The repository name connected to the project.

isPrivate.description: Whether the connected repository is private.

created.description: The timestamp when the project was created.

updated.description: The timestamp when the project was last updated.

items.description: An AppVeyor project returned by the projects API.

projects.description: The AppVeyor projects returned by the request.

count.description: The number of AppVeyor projects returned by the request.

actions.name: get_role
actions.description: Retrieve one AppVeyor team role by ID.

accountName.description: The AppVeyor account name used to scope requests for user-level API keys.

roleId.description: The AppVeyor role ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one AppVeyor role.

roleId.description: The AppVeyor role ID to retrieve.

isSystem.description: Whether the role is an AppVeyor system role.

created.description: The timestamp when the role was created.

updated.description: The timestamp when the role was last updated.

role.description: An AppVeyor role returned by the team API.

actions.name: get_roles
actions.description: List AppVeyor team roles accessible to the connected API token.

accountName.description: The AppVeyor account name used to scope requests for user-level API keys.

inputSchema.description: Optional AppVeyor account scoping parameters for this request.

roleId.description: The AppVeyor role ID to retrieve.

isSystem.description: Whether the role is an AppVeyor system role.

created.description: The timestamp when the role was created.

updated.description: The timestamp when the role was last updated.

items.description: An AppVeyor role returned by the team API.

roles.description: The AppVeyor roles returned by the request.

count.description: The number of AppVeyor roles returned by the request.

actions.name: get_users
actions.description: List AppVeyor team users accessible to the connected API token.

accountName.description: The AppVeyor account name used to scope requests for user-level API keys.

inputSchema.description: Optional AppVeyor account scoping parameters for this request.

accountId.description: The numeric AppVeyor account ID associated with the user.

accountName.description: The AppVeyor account name associated with the user.

isOwner.description: Whether the user owns the AppVeyor account.

isCollaborator.description: Whether the user is an AppVeyor collaborator.

roleId.description: The numeric AppVeyor role ID assigned to the user.

roleName.description: The AppVeyor role name assigned to the user.

created.description: The timestamp when the user was added.

updated.description: The timestamp when the user was last updated.

items.description: An AppVeyor user returned by the team API.

users.description: The AppVeyor users returned by the request.

count.description: The number of AppVeyor users returned by the request.
